chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 685 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For hearing of CMA No.10237/2021 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2021 without any significant progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
